backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for LS Group Inventory Management System, with data types and CRUD operations for inventory, bardana, orders, tools/machinery, raw materials, and a change log across two plants.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the stock addition bug fix (correct product ID passed on Add click) to InventoryTab.tsx, with high confidence and test ID REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key fixes, serving as a build-planning reference for the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'LS Group Inventory Management System' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component rendering the app header, a 6-tab navigation (Inventory, Bardana, Orders, Tools & Machinery, Raw Materials, Change Log), and a Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/BardanaTab.tsx: Bardana tab component displaying per-plant product stock tables with inline edit-and-save functionality, using useSetBardanaStock and ProductView types from the backend.
frontend/src/components/ChangeLogTab.tsx: Read-only Change Log tab that fetches and displays inventory stock changes sorted newest-first, showing IST timestamp, plant, product, signed quantity change, and user.
frontend/src/components/InventoryTab.tsx: React component that displays and manages finished-goods inventory across two plant sub-tabs, allowing users to add or remove stock quantities per product with sorted rows and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/OrdersTab.tsx: React component for managing sales orders in a table with inline add, edit, and delete functionality, converting between display strings and backend bigint/nanosecond formats.
React component that shows raw material stock levels per plant in a table and allows inline editing to set absolute stock quantities via a backend mutation.
frontend/src/components/ToolsMachineryTa: React component for managing a tools and machinery list with inline add, edit, and delete rows, persisting changes through backend mutation hooks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook that manage AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout flow, and identity persistence for ICP Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including inventory (get/add/remove stock), bardana (get/set stock), and orders (get/add), with cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens including colors, sidebar, and header.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class merging (cn), nanosecond timestamp formatting/conversion to IST and date strings, and sorting products by quantity with zero-stock items at the bottom.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH CSS variable-based color tokens, custom fonts (Inter/Rajdhani), border radius, box shadow, and accordion keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the inventory management app for LS Pulses/LS Foods LLP, tracking a known bug where stock addition fails due to incorrect product ID passing in the Inventory tab.
